description: Add a write-time edge kind/category validator. When an edge is written via appendRelationByRef (packages/pi-context/src/context-sdk.ts:1412) and appendRelationsByRef (:1549), check the parent item's kind against the relation_type's source_kinds and the child's against target_kinds (with the * wildcard) and the edge against the relation_type's category, and REJECT a mismatched edge at write with a clear error naming the offending endpoint kind and relation_type. This hoists the existing post-hoc kind check (validateContext, context-sdk.ts:1987-2021, FGAP-086/DEC-0037) to the write surface (the raw appendRelationsForDir, context.ts:649, cannot resolve endpoint kinds under the documented layering at context.ts:617-625). Presence-gate on source_kinds/target_kinds exactly as the validate-time check (context-sdk.ts:1990) so currently-passing writes are unaffected. Resolves the write-time-enforcement half of FGAP-090. Distinct from TASK-027 (ordering-edge endpoint-role DIRECTION, ordering-only; this checks source/target KIND + category across all relation_types).
acceptance_criteria: A real append-relation CLI invocation writing an edge whose parent or child item kind is not in the relation_type's source_kinds/target_kinds is rejected at write with an error naming the offending endpoint kind + relation_type, and the edge is not persisted.
A kind-correct append-relation succeeds and persists the edge.
A relation_type with neither source_kinds nor target_kinds set is not rejected at write (the presence-gate at context-sdk.ts:1990 is preserved at the write surface).

Write-time and validate-time kind semantics agree: an edge the write rejects, validateContext (context-sdk.ts:1987-2021) would also flag; an edge the write accepts, validateContext does not flag for kind. The existing validateContext check is unchanged.
npm run build + check + full test pass with 0 failures; a fresh adversarial probe confirms no over-reject of presence-gated (unset-kinds) types and write/validate parity.
